markdown:
#  View Funding Accounts as a Payor 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Background 
To pay invoices with Procore Pay, a Payments Admin must add and verify at least one (1) Funding Account in the Company level Payments tool. A Payments Admin can add more than one funding account to Procore Pay. However, a disbursement can only have one (1) funding account. Before adding a funding account, your company must open at least one (1) Deposit Account during the [implementation process](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-procore-pay).
##### Important
For security and verification purposes, all newly added funding accounts must undergo a test before they can be used to fund disbursements. **Before** adding a new account, contact your dedicated Procore Point of Contact or Customer Success Team. 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Add or Remove Payments Admins as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/add-or-remove-payments-admins)
  * [Add Funding Accounts as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/add-funding-accounts)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Payments Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.  
This opens the Payments Settings page. The 'Business Entities' page in the 'Payments Processing' tab is active by default. This page lists all of your company's business entities that have been configured to pay invoices.
  3. For each business entity, click the funding account(s) link to view the account information.  
![Funding Account Link](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d807fe2bda438595a836a4fb2ddf5930/27261816659839e1c0ca98512eb252ec/funding-account-link.png?fm=webp)


### Funding Accounts Table
The table below details the elements for the Funding Accounts table. [Verified funding accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-verified-bank-account-in-procore-pay) can receive a Drawdown Request when creating a Disbursement.  
| Nickname  | Field  | A Payments Admin enters the account nickname when linking an account. The nickname allows Payment Disbursers to identify an account when creating disbursements. It also protects your financial privacy by eliminating the need to provide disbursers with the full bank account number.  | [Add Funding Accounts as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/add-funding-accounts)  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Verification Status  | Field  | Shows the current verification status of the account.  | [Add Funding Accounts as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/add-funding-accounts) What are the default verification statuses for bank accounts in Procore Pay?  |  
| Bank ID  | Field  | A Payments Admin enters a unique Bank ID portion to be part of the unique check number issued to the next invoice payout from this account. A payout is an invoice payment in a disbursement.  | [Add Funding Accounts as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/add-funding-accounts)  |  
| Next Check No.  | Field  | A Payments Admin enters a unique Next Check No to be part of the unique check number issued to the next invoice payout from this account. A payout is an invoice payment in a disbursement.  | [Add Funding Accounts as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/add-funding-accounts)  |  
| _Default_  | Field  | Indicates the account is the default withdrawal account for Procore Pay in the payor environment.  | [Set a Default Funding Account as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/set-a-default-funding-account)  |  
| _Deactivated_  | Field  | Indicates the account has been deactivated.  | [Deactivate Funding Accounts as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/deactivate-accounts)  |  
| Overflow  | Menu  | Click the vertical ellipsis and choose one of the menu options. The available options in this menu are: _Edit_ , _Set as Default Funding Account_ , and _Deactivate_. On the _Default_ account, only _Edit_ and _Deactivate_ are available. On a _Deactivated_ account, only _Edit_ is available.  | [Manage Business Entities as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-entities)  |  
## See Also
  * [Deactivate Funding Accounts as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/deactivate-funding-accounts-as-a-payor)
  * [Configure Payment Processing as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/configure-payment-processing-as-a-payor)
  * [Procore Pay - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)


In Procore Pay, a _Payments Admin_ is a designated Procore user who administers the Company level Payments tool for that company's Procore account. Typically, one (1) or a small number of trusted users are designated to perform the tasks associated with this role.
In Procore Pay, a _funding account_ is a bank account where money is held by a financial institution and controlled by the payor. This is the 'Pay From' account.
In Procore Pay, a _deposit account_ is a bank account where money is held by a financial institution to process the payor's authorized transactions. This is the transaction banking account.
In Procore Pay, a _drawdown request_ refers to the request to process the drawdown of funds from a payor's funding account, to transmit the funds to the payor's deposit account. This is also referred to as a _Fedwire Drawdown_.
A _disbursement_ is the action of paying out money from a fund. In Procore Pay, a disbursement withdraws funds from a general contractor's funding account and transmits them to the general contractor's deposit account. Payment orders are then issued to withdraw funds from the deposit account to pay invoices.
title: View Funding Accounts as a Payor
description: How to view a list of the external bank accounts for the Company level Payments tool. This task can only be performed by one of your company's designated Payment Admins.
